name: elm-format
description: Format your code in the Elm idiomatic way

name: --output
options.description: Write output to FILE instead of overwriting the given source file

args.name: FILE
args.description: Name and location of output file

name: --validate
options.description: Check if files are formatted without changing them

name: --stdin
options.description: Read from stdin, output to stdout

name: --elm-version
options.description: The Elm version of the source files being formatted
